changelog: Purchase Orders: approve, order, and receive workflow with one-click conversion to a purchase, plus bulk reorder from low-stock items.
New reports: GSTR-1/GSTR-3B, Trial Balance, AR/AP Aging, and accurate Inventory Valuation & COGS, all with CSV export.
Bank Reconciliation for UPI/card settlements, and an expected-cash preview when closing the cash register.
Accounting: multi-invoice payment collection, credit account history, and Purchase Return history with a safe reversal option.
Bulk Excel (.xlsx) product import alongside CSV, and a barcode Scanner mode for rapid stock adjustments (Android).
Invoices now print with a QR code, CGST/SGST/IGST breakdown, HSN and batch per line, and the prescribing doctor.
Ctrl+K command palette, richer Audit Log and Alert filters, and real customer/patient profiles with a purchase and prescription timeline.
Settings: company logo upload, GST state picker, alert thresholds, and default payment mode are now editable.
